formal_target: A proof target cannot be treated as implemented unless the artifact and verifier result exist.
support_state_effect: validates record shape only; does not prove the Lean target
consumer_requirements: May be consumed only as schema-shape evidence unless a matching Lean build, process validator, behavior test, or benchmark record exists.

semantic_adequacy_review.review_note: The fixture does not decide whether the formal target captures the intended chapter boundary.

limitations: fixture validation is not a Lean proof
semantic adequacy review remains separate from schema validation
non_claims: does not prove all proof targets are operational
